title: qrafty's Mountain Villages
description: This datapack/mod adds beautiful snow-covered villages into the high-altitude snowy slopes biome! ❄️☃️
body:
# Villages up in the Snowy Slopes! ❄️☃️

This pack introduces naturally generated villages to elevated snowy slopes, seamlessly blending into the world with a true vanilla feel. 🏔️

![mountain villages (minecraft) with header image as overlay](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/074788fa5e5ea510d8af41ce1fc59064829dbd58.jpeg)

**Including:** Over 20+ custom structures, generating random to each other as a village.

![Discord invite image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf5120178dae9e7c654b76c21ef6e1780876e97b.webp)

## [DISCORD INVITE](https://www.qrafty.net/discord)

**Locate the villages with this command:**

```
/locate structure qrafty:mountain_village
```

You want to support me? Consider leaving a tip at my [Ko-Fi](https://ko-fi.com/qrafty) 😊

This pack is part of my main datapack [qraftyfied](https://modrinth.com/datapack/qraftyfied)!
